rows.label: qev091501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Fog Christoph if he is
worried about the mission.

rows.label: qev091501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Fog Christoph you're sorry he and
Frye still are not on good terms.

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0002
rows.name: No, though I appreciate the concern.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0003
rows.name: I'm confident we can keep the city safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0004
rows.name:
All the jobs we've done together have
given me some much-needed experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0006
rows.name:
I AM worried about my brother.
I've got a...bad feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0008
rows.name: I'm used to it by now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But I'm a little worried for him this
time. I've just got a...bad feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Still, I don't suppose
worrying will do any good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0011
rows.name:
The mission's started, and I
have to focus on my role.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Let's go report to Walter
outside of the east gate.[ST:wait ]
